title: CrafterStrike
description:
Counter Strike in minecraft! Huge load of weapons!
Deathmatch like gameplay at all times!
body:
# Important!
### The modpack needs the ftb library mod to work and successfully launch!
### You can get it [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-forge/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&version=1.20.1)
### [Direct Download link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-forge/download/6164053)


# Note:
Currently I'm more actively working on my [Military vehicle building modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/army-engineer) so expect this modpack might recieve updates either slower or not at all until I shift my time resources back onto this modpack.
---

The modpack has a completely vanilla (besides some commands) map resembling dust2.

**The original map was made by: [xjqshm](https://www.curseforge.com/members/xjqshm/projects)**

**you can access the original map [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/worlds/lesraisins-csgo-dust-ii)**

**The modpack was edited from: [hammer optimizing modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/hammer)**
That's why it runs so well! :D
##


### Notable mods:
- plasmo voicechat
- TACZ
- Essential
- Physics mod
- Sound physics remastered
- sdm shop

### Notable shaders (turned off by default):
- MakeUp Ultrafast
- miniature

### Note:

The keybinds are heavily modified to try match the keybinds in counter strike as close as possible!

The modpack doesn't have the bomb from the counter strike game and also has no matchmaking.
